role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of linguistic cues (no signs) and stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed tree species and forest composition correctly.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road markings and infrastructure standards correctly.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized infrastructure details (poles, rumble strips) correctly.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Terrain and vegetation descriptions match image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Road markings and shoulder types match image.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The agents provided high-quality, visually grounded assessments but failed to distinguish between the US and Canada due to shared infrastructure standards. The judge failed to synthesize a solution, resulting in a hallucinated prediction (Canada) and coordinates that do not match the image.
verdict.region_narrowing_notes: The judge failed to reach a consensus or generate hypotheses, resulting in a complete failure of the pipeline logic.
verdict.hypothesis_pool_notes: No hypothesis pool was generated, making evaluation impossible.
